name: Chocolate Swirl Cheesecake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 325°F.
2. Combine chocolate chips and 1/2 cup sugar over hot (not boiling) water in a heatproof bowl. Heat until the chips melt and the mixture is smooth. Remove from heat; set aside.
3. In a small bowl, combine graham-cracker crumbs, 2 tablespoons sugar, and melted butter. Mix well. Pat firmly into the bottom and 1/2 inch up the sides of a 9-inch springform pan. Set aside.
4. In a large bowl, beat cream cheese until light and creamy. Gradually add 3/4 cup sugar. Mix in sour cream and vanilla extract. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Divide batter into two bowls. Stir melted chocolate mixture into the first bowl. Pour the chocolate batter into the crumb-lined pan; spread the plain batter over it.
5. Cover with a knife, swirling the plain batter with the chocolate batter to create marbling.
6. Bake for 50 minutes or until the center is set and jiggles slightly when tapped. Cool at room temperature; refrigerate.
